dj_text: You've got NovaJane on the mic, That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. That was Unknown. Changing gears to Mr. Blue Sky - medieval style with vocals!.
commercial_text: Listen up, listeners {tagline:"It's time for our Emergency Alert System Test!"}.
recovery_text: Someone's been poking holes in reality. I'm looking at you, chat.
title: Mr. Blue Sky - medieval style with vocals!
